title: Millenniums Of Warring States
synopsis: Advanced gamer and streamer, Ji Qing traveled back to the Spring and Autumn Period equipped with a cheater "Shaohao Bone". However, the historical event "The Emperor and the Assassin" somehow succeeded, and the Seven Kingdoms fought for controlling each other, thus wars continued for thousands of years. Ren Yong, a bold man with loyalty and righteousness has also participated in the race. Now, how will "The Eternal Life" Ji Qing show his talents in the turbulent world? (Source: BilibiliTV)

title: Henbe
synopsis: All children dream to have a friend straight from a fairy tale... A little boy opens his closet and finds a strange creature with a parasol sitting in there. Nobody knows how he got there and from what mysterious worlds he is, but it is a fast friendship from the beginning. And nobody can ever know... (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Wan Gu Zui Qiang Zong
synopsis: In a special scientific experiment, Jun Changxiao arrives at the Starfall Continent and inherits a small sect. He must build it into the number one sect within 100 years. He works hard to establish the sect, recruit disciples, and leads them to build houses, farm, and maintain peace. The disciples have different personalities, but under Jun Changxiao’s leadership, they form a warm and harmonious family, supporting each other and growing together. (Source: Yuewen Animation English YouTube channel)

title: Jue Ji
synopsis: The Odin Mainland is separated into four countries, in each lives a group of soul masters protecting their county with their soul powers. The most powerful seven of them are known as Noble Lords. The story begins in the water origin, the Aslan Empire. Qi Ling has been a busboy in an inn since young and subconsciously tamed a legendary soul beast, Ice Fang in a battle between soul masters. Yin Chen (Kris Wu) came on orders of the Silver Priest to take him in as his disciple. With his help, Qi Ling heads to the Grave of the Souls to seek his soul weapon, yet as he couldn’t sit still like how his lord instructed him; he enters the Grave of the Souls with Tianshu You Hua and Guishan Lian Quan. Qi Ling thus become embroiled in the upcoming storm; a battle of soul powers between the lords. At the very same time, another conspiracy that has long been in the works within the Aslan Empire is gradually revealing itself. While searching for Qi Ling, Yin Chen found out that his master, the former

title: Rainbow Sea
synopsis: In an era where everyone is free to travel in space, there still exists an area in the universe where all lives and hopes are forbidden - the black hole. This ruthless star devours anything that comes in close contact, whether it is life, substance, or even light. The most avid adventurers don't dare to even mention going there, because of the risk. Until one day, a man in fiery red clothing declared to the whole universe: "In the deepest part of black hole, lies a mysterious place called Rainbow Sea. A place full of precious stones, rivers of gold and rainbow covered skies. Anyone who gets there gets all their wishes granted." This declaration ignited the enthusiasm of the whole universe, attracting people from everywhere. They followed the man in red into the black hole, and ultimately no one came back. The adventurers that vanished with the man in red were called the descendants of the loathful "Red Devil" and Rainbow Sea was then considered as history's biggest lie ever. Ten years

title: Chikyuu Bouei Kazoku OVA
synonyms: The Daichis - Earth's Defense Family OVA
synopsis: The Daichis are a family in danger of tearing itself apart. Dissatisfied and money obsessed mom Seiko has served wimpy and otaku dad Mamoru with divorce papers. Daughter Nozomi who has always been saddled with all the housework, feels pained that everyone is using her. The youngest albeit most foul mouthed, Dai is forced to watch all this as everything is going to pieces. However when the Galaxy Federation recruits the Daichis to combat alien threats to the wellbeing of the Earth, it will be a chance for the family to save the world and maybe themselves. (Source: Anime News Network) Note: Was originally planned to be released as episode 11 of the TV series but a replacement episode was made and this was later released on DVD.

title: Wagamama☆Fairy Mirumo de Pon! Wonderful
titleNative: わがまま☆フェアリー ミルモでポン! わんだほう
synonyms: Wagamama Fairy Mirumo de Pon! Wonderful
synopsis: One day, Kaede and Milmo met a strange creature. It was not a human or a fairly, but it was Tacos, an octopus-type robot. He said, I'm looking for the seven crystals dispersed in human and fairly worlds. I've been looking for them all over the world, and I finally found they were around here. But I got tired... Will you help me search for them? This is between us, but if you collect all the seven crystals, they will grant you any wish. Because it was too absurd, they wouldn't listen to him. But he was eagerly to ask them, and Kaede and Milmo decided to look for the crystals for him. Tacos turned her fairly call into a fairly call crystal in return. Fairly call crystal has a function to detect a crystal, and it can cast a session magic by combining their forces. What is the real purpose of Tacos? What is the true role of the crystal?

title: Kaiketsu Zorori: Mahou Tsukai no Deshi / Dai Kaizoku no Takara Sagashi
titleRomaji: Kaiketsu Zorori: Mahou Tsukai no Deshi / Dai Kaizoku no Takara Sagashi
titleNative: かいけつゾロリ　まほう使いのでし　大かいぞくの宝さがし
synonyms: Kaiketsu Zorori: Mahou Tsukai no Deshi
synopsis: "Unbelievable" Zorori is a prankster fox determined to become the Prince of Mischief, with his very own castle and beautiful bride. While is notorious for his prank-making schemes, his ill-meaning plots often backfire against him, and can usually end up even benefiting or cheering up his targets, much to his dismay. Nevertheless, Zorori has the wits and intelligence to wriggle out of the tightest of all spots, and journeys with a pair of twin boars, Ishishi and Noshishi, in order to fulfill his long wished-for goal and at last prove to his deceased mother, Mama Zorori that he truly holds the potential to achieve his dreams. (Source: Anidb)

title: Ling Wu Dalu
synopsis: Lingwu Continent is a world where spiritual power and martial spirit coexist. A spiritual cultivator can move mountains and rivers with a thought, and a martial artist can tear the world apart with bare hands. Chen Tian, ​​a former genius in Xingchen Town, lost his martial spirit and dried up his spiritual sea after he turned ten. Since then, he has become a waste of his family and has been looked down upon by others. In a life-and-death struggle, Chen Tian fell off a cliff and mistakenly entered the formation arranged by the ancient sword emperor. Under the influence of the power of the heavenly book, he awakened his spiritual and martial dual cultivation physique. At the same time, he also obtained a strange memory and a mysterious storage ring. From then on, he rose from adversity, broke through the reincarnation of the Heavenly Dao Palm, and finally crossed the shackles of the emperor's calamity and aspired to become the champion of Lingwu Continent! (Source: iQIYI)

tags.name: Full CGI

title: Xuan Jie Zhi Men
synopsis: In a world where warriors are respected, Shi Mu's fate seems destined to be different. As the adopted son of an aristocratic family, he is forced to embark on the road of a warrior to find the truth and redeem himself. From the four halls of Fengcheng to the struggle between sects, interests are entangled, and powerful enemies lurk. Every challenge makes Shi Mu more determined. In the end, Shi Mu realizes the power of his bloodline, which not only changes his own destiny, but also affects the future of many people. (Source: Bilibili, translated)
